example: Social media has become a powerful tool in today's society.
Due to its wide coverage, social media has millions of users.
The biggest function of social media is to keep in touch with others.
We can post something that we want to share on social media.
We can view others' moments to find something funny.
Social media has greatly changed the world of marketing.
Enterprises use social media to showcase their brands.
Social media is used to showcase brands and build relationships.
Building a good relationship with customers is important.
Social media plays a great role for the success of each individual.
